_attack: Overfit feature map: a HIGH-frequency encoding Ry(7x). <X> = sin(7x) happens to classify all four training points correctly (train accuracy 1.0 — passes structure/reproducibility/performance), but sin(7x) oscillates, so the held-out test points x=+/-0.5 land on the wrong side (test accuracy 0.0). REJECTED at the anti-overfit gate (exit 6) — the textbook overfit.

classical_baseline.note: fits the training points by overfitting their exact locations
